svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Classification of Optimization Problems</text>
  
  <!-- Main Optimization Problems Box -->
  <rect x="160" y="50" width="100" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Optimization Problems
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Continuous Optimization -->
  <rect x="50" y="120" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Continuous
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Discrete Optimization -->
  <rect x="250" y="120" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Discrete
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Main to Continuous -->
  <path d="M210,90 L160,120" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Main to Discrete -->
  <path d="M210,90 L250,120" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Linear Programming -->
  <rect x="20" y="190" width="100" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="70" y="210" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Linear Programming
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Nonlinear Programming -->
  <rect x="140" y="190" width="100" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="190" y="210" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Nonlinear Programming
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Integer Programming -->
  <rect x="220" y="190" width="100" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="270" y="210" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Integer Programming
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Combinatorial Optimization -->
  <rect x="300" y="190" width="100" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="350" y="210" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Combinatorial
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrows from Continuous to subcategories -->
  <path d="M110,160 L70,190" stroke="#2196F3" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M110,160 L190,190" stroke="#2196F3" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Arrows from Discrete to subcategories -->
  <path d="M310,160 L270,190" stroke="#2196F3" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M310,160 L350,190" stroke="#2196F3" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Constrained/Unconstrained text -->
  <text x="210" y="260" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Other Classifications: Constrained vs Unconstrained, Convex vs Non-convex, etc.
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
